docs.title: Verify your TRACE implementation before shipping
docs.text:
Quick Start  |  Test Modules  |  Conformance Levels  |  Changelog

Test suite v0.2. Tracks TRACE Spec v0.2.

Conformance tests for TRACE — Trust Runtime Attestation and Compliance Evidence. Run this suite against your implementation to verify it meets the spec before claiming TRACE compliance.

Seven test modules covering the full specification: envelope structure, signature algorithms, TEE runtime claims, policy binding, tool-call transcripts, SCITT transparency anchoring, and supply chain provenance.

docs.title: Quick start
docs.text:
pip install trace-tests
trace-tests verify --record path/to/trust-record.jwt --level 1

docs.title: Test modules
docs.text: Module ID Tests Envelope TR-ENV EAT structure, required fields, iat validity Signature TR-SIG ES256/ES384/EdDSA, key binding, chain Runtime TR-RTE TEE platform, measurement format, RIM URI Policy TR-POL Bundle hash, enforcement mode, TEE binding Transcript TR-TXN Tool-call transcript hash binding (Phase 2+) Transparency TR-ANC SCITT receipt URI, inclusion proof Provenance TR-SCA SLSA level, builder URI, digest format

docs.title: Resources
docs.text: 📖 Full documentation tests.agentrust-io.com 📄 TRACE Specification trace-spec 🗂 Test schemas schemas/ 💬 Discussions GitHub Discussions 📋 Changelog CHANGELOG.md

docs.title: Contributing
docs.text: See CONTRIBUTING.md. New test cases must include a normative spec reference, a positive case, and a negative case with a structured error code (TR-<MODULE>-<NNN>).

docs.title: v0.2.0 — 2026-06-19
docs.text:
• DID subject support: subject now accepts did: URIs in addition to spiffe://.
  • Embedded signature verification: plain TRACE records signed with agentrust-trace sign_record() are now cryptographically verified at all levels.
  • SLSA Level 0: build_provenance.slsa_level: 0 is now valid for software-only / development records.
  • Software-only platform: runtime.platform: "software-only" accepted at Level 0.
  • Private key leak detection: TR-SIG now fails records that embed a private key (d member) in cnf.jwk.

docs.title: v0.1.0 — 2026-05-01
docs.text:
• Initial release with 7 test modules: TR-ENV, TR-SIG, TR-RTE, TR-POL, TR-TXN, TR-ANC, TR-SCA.
  • Conformance levels 0, 1, 2.

docs.title: Contributing
docs.text: Thank you for your interest in contributing to the TRACE test suite.

docs.title: How to Contribute
docs.text:
1. Fork the repository and create a feature branch
  2. Add or update conformance tests following the patterns in existing test files
  3. Commit using Conventional Commits
  4. Open a pull request against main

docs.title: Reporting Security Issues
docs.text: Use GitHub Security Advisories rather than public issues.

docs.title: Code of Conduct
docs.text: See CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md.

docs.title: Error Codes
docs.text: All TRACE test failures emit a structured error code of the form TR-<MODULE>-<NNN>.

docs.title: TR-ENV — Envelope
docs.text: Code Description TR-ENV-001 Missing or invalid eat_profile URI TR-ENV-002 iat is missing, not an integer, or out of range TR-ENV-003 subject does not match SPIFFE URI or DID pattern TR-ENV-004 One or more required fields are absent

docs.title: TR-SIG — Signature
docs.text: Code Description TR-SIG-001 Signature algorithm is not Ed25519 TR-SIG-002 cnf.jwk missing or malformed TR-SIG-003 Signature verification failed TR-SIG-004 Private key material (d member) found in cnf.jwk

docs.title: TR-RTE — Runtime
docs.text: Code Description TR-RTE-001 runtime.platform is not a recognised TEE enum value TR-RTE-002 runtime.measurement is not a valid sha256: digest

docs.title: TR-POL — Policy
docs.text: Code Description TR-POL-001 policy.bundle_hash is not a valid sha256: digest TR-POL-002 policy.enforcement_mode is not enforce or monitor

docs.title: TR-TXN — Transcript
docs.text: Code Description TR-TXN-001 tool_transcript.hash is not a valid sha256: digest TR-TXN-002 tool_transcript.call_count is negative or not an integer

docs.title: TR-ANC — Transparency
docs.text: Code Description TR-ANC-001 transparency field missing or empty TR-ANC-002 transparency URI does not use https:// scheme

docs.title: TR-SCA — Provenance
docs.text: Code Description TR-SCA-001 build_provenance.slsa_level is not 0–4 TR-SCA-002 build_provenance.digest is not a valid sha256: digest

docs.title: Conformance Levels
docs.text:
TRACE defines three conformance levels. Higher levels require all lower-level modules plus additional ones.

Level Required Modules Use Case 0 TR-ENV, TR-SIG, TR-POL Software-only development and staging 1 Level 0 + TR-RTE, TR-SCA Production TEE-attested records 2 Level 1 + TR-TXN, TR-ANC Full records with transparency anchoring

docs.title: Choosing a level
docs.text:
• Use Level 0 during development. Records can use runtime.platform: "software-only" and build_provenance.slsa_level: 0.
  • Use Level 1 for production deployments in a TEE (AMD SEV-SNP, Intel TDX, NVIDIA H100).
  • Use Level 2 when you need an auditable, tamper-evident log with a SCITT transparency service.

The certification program (launching 2027) will require Level 1 at minimum.

docs.title: Test Modules
docs.text:
The TRACE conformance suite is divided into seven modules. Each module maps to a section of the TRACE specification.

Module ID Prefix Spec Section What It Tests Envelope TR-ENV §3.2 EAT envelope structure, eat_profile URI, required fields, iat validity Signature TR-SIG §3.2.1 Algorithm conformance (Ed25519), key binding, private key leak detection Runtime TR-RTE §3.1 TEE platform enum, measurement format, RIM URI resolution Policy TR-POL §3.1 Policy bundle hash format, enforcement mode values Transcript TR-TXN §3.1 Tool-call transcript hash binding Transparency TR-ANC §3.2 SCITT receipt URI format, inclusion proof structure Provenance TR-SCA §3.1 SLSA provenance level, builder URI, digest format

docs.title: Install
docs.text: pip install agentrust-trace-tests

docs.title: Run against a Trust Record
docs.text:
trace-tests verify --record path/to/trust-record.json --level 1

Level 0 is software-only (development). Level 1 requires TEE attestation. Level 2 adds transparency anchoring.

docs.title: Run all levels
docs.text:
trace-tests verify --record trust-record.json --level 0
trace-tests verify --record trust-record.json --level 1
trace-tests verify --record trust-record.json --level 2

docs.title: Exit codes
docs.text: Code Meaning 0 All required tests passed 1 One or more tests failed 2 Record could not be loaded

docs.title: Output format
docs.text:
Each test emits a structured result:

TR-ENV-001  PASS  EAT envelope: eat_profile present
TR-SIG-001  PASS  Signature: Ed25519 algorithm confirmed
TR-RTE-001  FAIL  Runtime: TEE measurement missing (required at level 1)

Error codes follow the form TR-<MODULE>-<NNN>.

docs.title: TR-ANC — Transparency
docs.text: Tests transparency anchoring via SCITT.

docs.title: Required at Level 2+
docs.text: Test ID Description TR-ANC-001 transparency is a non-empty URI TR-ANC-002 URI scheme is https://

docs.title: TR-ENV — Envelope
docs.text: Tests the top-level EAT envelope structure of a TRACE Trust Record.

docs.title: Required at Level 0+
docs.text: Test ID Description Positive Case Negative Case TR-ENV-001 eat_profile present and correct URI tag:agentrust.io,2026:trace-v0.1 missing or wrong TR-ENV-002 iat is a valid Unix timestamp integer, reasonable range string, future date TR-ENV-003 subject matches SPIFFE URI or DID spiffe://trust.example/agent/x or did:key:z6Mk... bare string TR-ENV-004 Required fields present all of: eat_profile, iat, subject, model, runtime, policy, data_class, build_provenance, appraisal missing any

docs.title: TR-POL — Policy
docs.text: Tests Cedar policy bundle binding.

docs.title: Required at Level 0+
docs.text: Test ID Description TR-POL-001 policy.bundle_hash is a valid sha256: digest TR-POL-002 policy.enforcement_mode is enforce or monitor

docs.title: TR-RTE — Runtime
docs.text: Tests TEE platform attestation in the runtime field.

docs.title: Required at Level 1+
docs.text: Test ID Description TR-RTE-001 runtime.platform is a known TEE enum value TR-RTE-002 runtime.measurement is a valid sha256: digest TR-RTE-003 RIM URI (if present) resolves to a valid reference image

docs.title: TR-SCA — Provenance
docs.text: Tests SLSA build provenance.

docs.title: Required at Level 1+
docs.text: Test ID Description TR-SCA-001 build_provenance.slsa_level is 0–4 TR-SCA-002 build_provenance.digest is a valid sha256: digest

docs.title: TR-SIG — Signature
docs.text: Tests Ed25519 signature binding on the TRACE Trust Record.

docs.title: Required at Level 0+
docs.text: Test ID Description TR-SIG-001 Signature algorithm is Ed25519 (OKP crv=Ed25519) TR-SIG-002 cnf.jwk present and carries the public key TR-SIG-003 Signature verifies over the canonical record bytes (RFC 8785 JCS) TR-SIG-004 cnf.jwk does not contain private key material (d member absent)

docs.title: TR-TXN — Transcript
docs.text: Tests tool-call transcript binding.

docs.title: Required at Level 2+
docs.text: Test ID Description TR-TXN-001 tool_transcript.hash is a valid sha256: digest TR-TXN-002 tool_transcript.call_count is a non-negative integer
